title: KADAX Glass Jars 4 L, Large Jars with Wide Mouth for Preserving, Pickling and Fermenting, Storage Jars for Pickles and Sauerkraut (Set of 2, Black Lids)
features: Durable: The use of high-quality glass ensures that the jars can withstand high temperatures without cracking. This durability is essential for scalding, pasteurising and pickling processes, contributing to a long lifespan for the jars.
Reusable: The non-absorbent nature of the jars allows them to be reused multiple times without retaining any residual odours or flavours from previous contents.

Capacious: The generous 4-liter capacity of these jars provides ample space for storing a variety of preserves. This makes them particularly useful for pickling cucumbers and cabbage, marinating peppers and tomatoes, as well as storing tinctures, juices, and jams.
Transparent: The clear glass construction not only provides a visually appealing display of your culinary creations but also allows for easy identification of the jar's contents.
Practical: The large jars are designed to be dishwasher safe, simplifying the cleaning process and making them convenient for reuse.
